india_trends.title: BHEL shares soar 13% after Q4 net profit rockets 156% YoY to Rs 1,290 crore, revenue up 37%
india_trends.summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd (BHEL) shares surged over 13% after reporting a robust March quarter with a 156% jump in net profit to Rs 1,290.50 crore. Revenue from operations also saw a significant 37% increase. The company also recommended a final dividend of Rs 1.40 per share for FY26.
